title: Rank 9 Region
content:
R
ank 9 Region
 is the location where the strongest cultivators of the 
Cloud Sea Star System
 reside.

All sects in the rank 9 region reside on cultivation planets which are a rarity across the entire Cloud Sea.

Origin stones are mainly monopolized by the sects of the rank 9 region as only they are strong enough to tame Rank 12 Fog Beasts and collect the origin stones they disperse.

The sects in rank 9 region are home to as many as three Third Step cultivators.

Background
[
]

There are a total of four sects in the rank 9 region, namely the 
God Sect
, the 
Ghost Sect
, the 
Demon Sect
, and the 
Heaven Breaking Sect
. The Heaven Breaking Sect is the weakest, while the God Sect is the strongest. The Ghost Sect is the most mysterious. The Demon Sect is the most deadly.

A long time ago, there was only one sect in the rank 9 region of the Cloud Sea. It was the God Sect.

After the God Sect had ruled the Cloud Sea for countless years, the first outbreak of fierce beasts occurred. Among them, there were three fierce beasts with human form that were said to have come from another star system.

Without the God Sect, this outbreak of fierce beasts would have spread across the entire Cloud Sea. In the end, it was stopped by the God Sect, so it didn’t spread. That war was said to have brought heavy casualties. After suppressing the fierce beasts, the God Sect sent out a group of people to be stationed in the depths of the rank 9 region. There is crack in space there that links to a mysterious star system. Some extremely powerful beasts came from there. In order to stop the fierce beasts from spreading, battles broke out there for tens of thousands of years. Even now, the fight continues.

A part of the God Sect gave up their freedom and remained deep within the rank 9 region, acting as the first line of defense. However, as time passed, these God Sect disciples became independent and started calling themselves the Demon Sect. They stopped taking orders from the God Sect, but they still defended that position from waves of fierce beast attacks.

The God Sect dreaded the Demon Sect and the invading fierce beasts so they first helped promote the Ghost Sect, who are good at using soul capture spells, into a rank 9 sect. Then they raised the Heaven Breaking Sect into rank 9 as well. All of this was to prepare for the second outbreak that could happen at any time.
